name: Warden
notes: Best-tier Commander, Capital-only via Command Centre — completes the basic/rare/best set alongside Vanguard and Nightfall. Unlike Ambulance/Repair Truck's always-on heal_over_time, heal_out_of_combat only ticks once a squad hasn't taken damage recently (same lastDamagedAt-gated pattern buildings already use for their 5%-per-5-tick regen, see 06-building-stats-and-defenses.md/07-data-architecture.md) — troops otherwise have no passive regen at all, so this is Warden's whole niche: sustain between fights rather than in the middle of one. filter: "own_regiment_and_self" is a variant of Vanguard/Nightfall's "own_regiment" that also includes the Commander's own squad (which isn't a member of its own regiment's squadIds) — Warden heals itself as well as every squad it leads, still capped at maxSquadsLed: 4. Stacks with Ambulance/Repair Truck if both are present, since those apply unconditionally.
